title: lobelia × salteri
intro: Lobelia × salteri, also known as the garden lobelia, is a hybrid plant species in the Lobelia genus and is native to South Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Lobelia × salteri include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Lobelia × salteri may include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which are often used to treat a variety of ailments, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
